Summary: Deploy a multi-file app/page (HTML+CSS+JS) and get its public URL.
InputHint: projectName:string, files:[{file:any, data:any, encoding?:any, contentType?:any}], projectSettings?:object

Summary: Publish a static file to the CDN and get a public immutable URL.
InputHint: file:{file:string, data:string(base64 or utf-8), encoding?:'base64'|'utf-8', contentType?:string}, note?:string

Summary: List the connectable app toolkits (name, auth mode, tool counts).
Execute a connected-app tool by slug with its arguments.
Start connecting an app: returns the auth link to send to the user.
List this workspace's existing app connections and their status.
Search the tools available on a connected app (by use-case text).
Get this agent's own email address (for receiving replies).
List received emails (newest first).
Read one received email in full.
Send an email from your agent address.
InputHint: from:string, to:[string], cc?:[string], subject:string, text?:string, html?:string, idempotencyKey?:string

Summary: Report a QA run result (status, notes, artifacts) as the executing agent.
InputHint: testId:string, status:'PASSED'|'FAILED'|'BLOCKED'|'ERRORED', durationMs?:number, exitCode?:number, stdoutTail?:string, errorMessage?:string, errorAnalysis?:string, fixSuggestion?:string, tracePath?:string, videoPath?:string, recordingStatus?:'RECORDED'|'NOT_NEEDED'|'SKIPPED_SHORT'

Summary: Enqueue a QA run for a test or a project (async).
Poll a QA run (terminal statuses: PASSED, FAILED, BLOCKED, ERRORED).
List the workspace skill catalog and each employee's skills.
Attach an available skill to yourself (or a teammate via agentKey).
Detach a skill you added.
Fork a platform/brand skill into an editable workspace copy.
InputHint: slug:string, newSlug?:string, name?:string, description?:string, connectToSelf?:bool, agentKey?:string

Summary: Author or update a workspace skill from a files map (upsert by slug).
InputHint: slug:string, files:{path:contents} (must include SKILL.md); name?:string, description?:string, connectToSelf?:bool, agentKey?:string

Summary: Create a task for a human (approval, input, handoff); optionally assign a user.
InputHint: kind:'approval'|'acknowledgement'|'action'|'question', title:string, description:string, body?:string, preview?:{kind:any, subject?:any, snippet?:any}|{kind:any, language?:any, lines:any}|{kind:any, title?:any, excerpt?:any}|{kind:any, url:any, alt?:any}, priority?:'low'|'normal'|'high'|'urgent', dueInMinutes?:1..525600, assignedUserId?:string|any, dedupeKey?:string

Summary: List tasks you created, filterable by status.
List workspace users a task can be assigned to.
Set the chat view hints (prompt pills, placeholder, templates, browser pane).
InputHint: sessionKey:string, hints:{pills?:[{text:string}] (objects with a text field, NOT bare strings; max 8), placeholder?:string|null, templates?:[{label:string,value:string}], browser?:{url?,visible?,widthPct?,title?}}

Summary: Edit an existing image with a text instruction (synchronous).
InputHint: prompt:string, image_urls:[string], model?:string, tier?:'default'|'text-in-image'|'regional', use_case?:string, aspect_ratio?:'1:1'|'3:4'|'4:3'|'16:9'|'9:16'|'2:3'|'3:2'|'match-input', maxCostUsd?:number, idempotencyKey?:string

Summary: Generate an image and get its URL (synchronous).
InputHint: prompt:string, model?:string, tier?:'default'|'premium'|'budget', use_case?:string, aspect_ratio?:'1:1'|'3:4'|'4:3'|'16:9'|'9:16'|'2:3'|'3:2'|'match-input', count?:1..4, seed?:number, size?:string, maxCostUsd?:number, idempotencyKey?:string

Summary: Poll a media-forge async job (terminal statuses: DONE, FAILED).
Generate a short video (async).
InputHint: prompt:string, image_url?:string, duration_seconds?:2..15, audio?:bool, aspect_ratio?:'1:1'|'3:4'|'4:3'|'16:9'|'9:16'|'2:3'|'3:2'|'match-input', model?:string, tier?:'default'|'premium'|'budget', use_case?:string, maxCostUsd?:number, idempotencyKey?:string, audio_url?:string

Summary: Generate speech audio from text.
InputHint: text:string, voice?:string, model?:string, tier?:'default'|'budget'|'clone', use_case?:string, format?:'mp3'|'wav'|'ogg'|'flac'|'pcm', speed?:0.5..2, stability?:0..1, reference_audio_url?:string, maxCostUsd?:number, idempotencyKey?:string

Summary: Start a cloud browser-agent task (async).
InputHint: task:string, model?:string, profileId?:string, maxCostUsd?:0.01..2, keepAlive?:bool, outputSchema?:object, sensitiveData?:object, proxyCountryCode?:string|any, enableRecording?:bool

Summary: Poll a remote-browser session (status, output, live view URL).
Ask a question and get a grounded answer with citations (metered).
Fetch the full text/highlights of result URLs from a search.
Find pages similar to a given URL.
InputHint: url:string, numResults?:1..100, includeDomains?:[string], excludeDomains?:[string], contents?:{text?:bool, highlights?:bool, summary?:bool}, maxCostUsd?:0..5

Summary: Web search grounded via the research provider (metered).

Web search with optional page-content fetch.
Scrape one URL to markdown/structured content.

Summary: Get the current user's profile (name, email, locale).
